headline: Tesla falls 14%, Alphabet sinks 6% as AI spending concerns spook investors
detail: This is a significant blow to the tech sector, directly impacting the "AI spending" narrative that has fueled many of your chip and tech names. Widespread large-cap tech weakness often drags down related sectors.
rec: Consider trimming QQQ and SMH, both currently on TRIM status, to reduce exposure to the broader tech/chip sector amidst this weakness. Also, re-evaluate your leveraged positions like SOXL and SPAL.
